children.text: Building AI-powered enterprise SaaS solutions for pharmaceutical medical affairs, focusing on full-stack development with modern web technologies and generative AI.

responsibilities: Architect and ship full-stack generative AI SaaS applications using TypeScript, React, Node.js, and GraphQL
Design serverless agentic RAG pipelines with LLMs and vector search
Collaborate with product stakeholders to gather requirements and iterate based on feedback
Implement enterprise-grade security with SSO (Okta) and role-based access control
Build data analytics solutions integrating Salesforce, Tableau, and Form Assembly
achievements: Architected generative AI platform reducing medical insight delivery time by 50% through automated analysis
Implemented serverless agentic RAG pipeline with LLMs, vector search (OpenSearch), and enterprise authentication
Automated manual review of 6,000-8,000 conference sessions from 1-2 weeks to minutes using Python
Deployed centralized analytics solution transitioning 250+ users from Smartsheet to Salesforce + Tableau with 50% efficiency improvement

children.text: Conducted research under Dr. Truong X. Tran, building cloud-based applications for scientific research and developing deep learning models for medical imaging.

responsibilities: Build and deploy cloud-based research applications using Django, React, and PostgreSQL
Develop deep learning models for medical image classification
Collaborate with medical researchers to refine requirements and validate results
Deploy applications on AWS and Azure with user authentication and role-based access
Execute full SDLC from requirements gathering to production deployment
achievements: Built cloud-based protein crystallization application enabling 10+ researchers to collaborate remotely, reducing processing time by 50%
Developed deep learning model for classifying Atypical Parkinsonian diseases with 80% accuracy
Deployed applications on both AWS and Azure clouds with enterprise authentication
Collaborated with Penn State Health Milton S. Hershey Medical Center on medical AI research

children.text: Served as teaching assistant and grader for multiple computer science courses, supporting students in understanding complex technical concepts.

responsibilities: Assist students with Design and Analysis of Algorithms coursework
Grade assignments and provide feedback for Machine Learning course
Support students in Calculus, Statistics, and Python Programming courses
Hold office hours and conduct review sessions
Mentor students on academic and career development
achievements: Supported 100+ students across multiple technical courses
Received positive feedback from students and faculty for teaching effectiveness
Helped students improve understanding of complex algorithms and ML concepts
Mentored students on career paths in software engineering and AI

children.text: Delivered enterprise cloud solutions for Fortune 500 clients through infrastructure management, automation, and team leadership.

responsibilities: Lead team of 4 engineers deploying enterprise applications on Azure Cloud
Design and build CI/CD pipelines for Kubernetes clusters
Implement infrastructure as code using Terraform for multi-cloud deployments
Gather requirements and create user stories using agile methodology
Collaborate with clients to deliver solutions on time
achievements: Led team deploying 16+ microservices for KPMG International on Azure using Terraform and Kubernetes
Designed CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time by 50% and ensuring 99.9% uptime
Implemented Terraform modules for DNS, IAM, and multi-tenant deployments on GCP, reducing provisioning time by 40%
Managed projects using agile methodology with daily Scrums and close client collaboration
